message.content:
@startuml
title GameEnginePluginLifecycle
participant "Host Application" as HostApp
participant "Host Application Interop" as HostInterop
participant "Game Engine Plugin" as GEPlugin

HostApp -> HostApp: Initialization
HostApp -> HostInterop: new
activate HostInterop
HostInterop -> HostInterop: Load GE Plugin(s)
HostInterop -> GEPlugin: load into memory
activate GEPlugin
HostInterop -> GEPlugin: GEP_Initialize
GEPlugin --> HostInterop: initialization_ok = 0
deactivate GEPlugin

loop Repeat Every Frame Period
    HostInterop -> GEPlugin: GEP_HandleSimulationReponseMessages
    activate GEPlugin
    GEPlugin --> HostInterop: handled_ok = 0
    deactivate GEPlugin
    note right of HostInterop: delays
    HostInterop -> GEPlugin: GEP_HandleSimulationControlMessages
    activate GEPlugin
    GEPlugin --> HostInterop: handled_ok = 0
    deactivate GEPlugin
end

@enduml
